doc_title_en: Notice Regarding Revision to Dividend Forecast for the Fiscal Year Ended March 2026 (Dividend Increase and Commemorative Dividend)

key_facts.reason_jp: 創立60周年を迎えたため、株主への感謝の意を表す

name_jp: 昭和システムエンジニアリング
summary_en: FY3/26 year-end dividend raised to 66 yen/share from 55 yen/share prior forecast: 61 yen ordinary dividend (6 yen increase) + 5 yen commemorative dividend marking 60th anniversary. Payout-ratio target 30–40% range.
summary_jp: FY3/26期末配当を55円から66円に修正：普通配当61円（6円増）+記念配当5円（創立60周年）。配当性向目標30～40％。
tag_en: Dividend Hike - 66 yen/share (61 ordinary + 5 commemorative) from 55 yen/share - FY3/26
tag_jp: 増配 - 66円/株（通常配当61円+記念配当5円）vs 55円/株 - FY3/26期末
